## Problem

What user problem would this solve?

## Proposed Behavior

What should AppShelf do?

## Scope Notes

Does this stay within AppShelf's local app library scope, or does it move toward IDE, process manager, package manager, or deployment behavior?

## Alternatives

What workarounds or existing tools did you consider?
